structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Dual-Duct VAV Terminal Unit − Mixing Control with Inlet Airflow Sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints for cooling max, minimum, and heating max vary by zone group mode as defined in Table 5.12.4.
configurable_values: Occupied: Cooling max = Vcool-max, Minimum = Vmin*, Heating max = Vheat-max
Cooldown: Cooling max = Vcool-max, Minimum = 0, Heating max = 0
Setup: Cooling max = Vcool-max, Minimum = 0, Heating max = 0
Warmup: Cooling max = 0, Minimum = 0, Heating max = Vheat-max
Setback: Cooling max = 0, Minimum = 0, Heating max = Vheat-max
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat -max 0 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0

evidence_quote:
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat -max 0 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling State Cold Duct Airflow Setpoint Reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, Cooling Loop output resets active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint, and cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When  the Zone State  is cooling , the Cooling Loop  output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint  from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint . The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint .

evidence_quote: When  the Zone State  is cooling , the Cooling Loop  output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint  from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint . The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cold Duct Supply Temperature Override in Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: active cold duct airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If cold  duct supply air temperature fro m the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint .

evidence_quote: If cold  duct supply air temperature fro m the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband State Cold Duct Airflow Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, active cold duct airflow setpoint = min endpoint, cold duct damper modulates to maintain, hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint; cold duct damper modulated to maintain measured airflow at setpoint; hot duct damper closed
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State  is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint . The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint . The hot duct  damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State  is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint . The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint . The hot duct  damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Ventilation Source for Deadband Cooling Damper Operation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Deadband airflow is maintained by the cooling damper because the cooling system has a definite ventilation source; dual-duct heating fan generally lacks direct ventilation.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The deadband airflow is maintained by the co oling damper , as the cooling system has a definite source of ventilation.

evidence_quote: The deadband airflow is maintained by the co oling damper , as the cooling system has a definite source of ventilation.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Hot Duct Airflow Setpoint Reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is heating, heating-loop output resets active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating max endpoint; hot damper modulates to maintain; cooling damper maintains sum of inlet airflows at min endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: heating-loop output shall reset active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint; hot duct damper modulated to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint; cooling damper controls sum of inlet airflows to minimum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State  is heating , the heating -loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint  from zero  to the heating maximum endpoint . The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint . The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint .

evidence_quote: When the Zone State  is heating , the heating -loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint  from zero  to the heating maximum endpoint . The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint . The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot Duct Supply Temperature Override in Heating
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If hot-deck supply air temperature < room temperature, active hot duct airflow setpoint ≤ min endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: hot-deck supply air temperature < room temperature
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: active hot duct airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If hot-deck supply air temperature from air handler is les s than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint .

evidence_quote: If hot-deck supply air temperature from air handler is les s than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Close Heating Damper if Heating Air Handler Not Proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating air handler is not proven ON, heating damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: heating air handler not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: heating damper closed
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Close Cooling Damper if Cooling Air Handler Not Proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, cooling damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: cooling air handler not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: cooling damper closed
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm (<70% of setpoint)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm (<50% of setpoint)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan serving zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes, generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: fan serving zone OFF and airflow sensor reading > larger of 10% of maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan s erving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan s erving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan serving damper is proven ON, generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: damper position 0%, airflow sensor reading > larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes with fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0 %, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0 %, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Constant Value Thresholds for Airflow Sensor Alarms
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The constant value thresholds for airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms should be based on the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow.  The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow.  The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to system level point to force airflow setpoints to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force damper positions; and reset request-hours accumulators.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling/heating dampers full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vheat -max,
e. force  cooling damper full clo sed/open ,
f. force  heating damper full closed/open , and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vheat -max,
e. force  cooling damper full clo sed/open ,
f. force  heating damper full closed/open , and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Request (3 requests, large temperature excess)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 5°F for 2 minutes (after suppression period), send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: zone temperature > cooling setpoint + 5°F for 2 min, after suppression period
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: send 3 cooling SAT reset requests
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Request (2 requests, moderate temperature excess)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°F for 2 minutes (after suppression), send 2 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: zone temperature > cooling setpoint + 3°F for 2 min, after suppression period
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: send 2 cooling SAT reset requests
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.

evidence_quote: Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Request (1 request, high Cooling Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if Cooling Loop > 95%, send 1 request until Cooling Loop < 85%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Cooling Loop > 95%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: send 1 cooling SAT reset request until Cooling Loop < 85%
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.

evidence_quote: Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
